reference_module.title: File Search, Retrieval and Vector Stores

checklist.entry: Use file search when model output needs grounded retrieval from uploaded or indexed files.
Set up vector stores and upload files before exposing file search to a model response.
Use include options when the application needs search results for audit, debugging or citation display.
Record supported file formats, parsing constraints, metadata filters and freshness assumptions.
Treat vector stores as indexed retrieval infrastructure, not an authoritative database.
Record file provenance, chunking assumptions, indexing status and update/delete behaviour.
Do not expose restricted research material through retrieval unless permission and minimisation controls are satisfied.
